name: LearnWorlds Online Course API
what_it_does: White-label online course and learning community platform with REST API — enabling creators and businesses to sell courses, certifications, and memberships with full branding control, interactive video, and API access for user management and enrollment automation.
use_cases: Creating and enrolling users in courses programmatically via API for B2B training
Querying learner progress and completion data for enterprise L&D reporting
Syncing LearnWorlds enrollment data with CRM or HRIS systems via API
Managing course subscriptions and payments programmatically
Building custom learning portals using LearnWorlds API as backend
not_for: Academic LMS with grading and SIS integration (use Canvas or Blackboard)
Simple free course creation without white-label needs (use Teachable free)
Enterprise LMS with complex compliance tracking (use Cornerstone or Docebo)
best_when: A business or creator wants white-label online course platform with full branding, interactive features, and API access for CRM/HRIS integration.
avoid_when: You need academic LMS features, pure community without courses, or very simple course creation without white-label.

auth.notes: API key from LearnWorlds admin. Bearer token auth. School-scoped access (each school has separate API key). Scoped for user management, enrollment, and reporting. Webhook for enrollment and completion events.

pricing.paid_tiers: Starter from $29/month; Pro Trainer from $99/month; Learning Center from $299/month; High Volume custom
pricing.notes: No free tier. Greek company (Athens). Founded 2012. White-label differentiator with full custom domain and branding. API on Learning Center+ plans. Interactive video with built-in questions. Certificate builder. Strong in enterprise B2B training and coaching businesses.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per plan; documented in API reference

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: REST API for users, courses, enrollments, and progress. Bearer token per school. Webhook for enrollment events. Good documentation for core operations. School-scoped — each LearnWorlds school has separate credentials. API on higher-tier plans only.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: User creation idempotent by email. Enrollment creation idempotent for same user/course combination. Progress reads idempotent. Payment operations not idempotent.
known_agent_gotchas: API requires Learning Center plan ($299/month) or higher
Each LearnWorlds school is a separate API credential scope
Interactive video content cannot be created via API — UI only
GDPR consideration for EU-based company — data processing agreements needed

security_score_components.security_notes: TLS enforced. GDPR compliant — Greek company with EU privacy focus. Bearer token auth. EU and US data residency. School-scoped credentials limit blast radius. Standard SaaS security for course platform.
